instruction: Preserve the latest 3 user directives and 3 assistant responses around task-surface mapping, readiness-gap queue coverage, and live-green model metrics.
input: User required direct task-number labels on visible UI surfaces, required confirmation that the D01/D02/D03/D04/C01/C02/C03/T01/T02/T03/T04 readiness findings are represented in queued work, and required the live model metrics to render green when the section is operational.
output: The repo now tracks 23 GUI surfaces including model status and scale analysis, the missing readiness items D01/D03/C01 were added to task_queue.json so the full list is represented, and the core model metrics now inherit the green operational styling when the card is live.
